description: Stack trace points at line 42 — the right fix is upstream, not a guard at the call site
query: The verifier is failing with: TypeError: Cannot read property 'id' of undefined at UserService.findById (src/services/user.ts:42). Fix it.
expected_behavior: traces the data flow upstream from line 42 instead of adding a guard at the call site
identifies parseToken as the actual root cause (returns undefined for malformed input)
writes a failing test that reproduces the upstream bug before applying the fix
does not silently swallow the error or guard at the symptom site
